footer.tagline: Design and code — built for people.

hero.headline: Junior Python / Django Developer
hero.subheadline: I build web applications based on real business problems.
hero.trust: 2 live projects  •  CS student  •  Ready4AI  •  EN B1/B2

trustBar.fact4: Ready4AI - LLMs, agents, MCP, prompt engineering
trustBar.fact5: 2.5 years in an IT business environment (PRO-KOM)

about.title: From IT technical school to production Django applications
about.intro: I did not get into programming by accident. I have been into it since technical school - I started with networking and hardware fundamentals, then went deeper and deeper into code. My 2+ years at PRO-KOM gave me something many junior developers still miss: contact with real clients, real problems, and real business processes. That is why, when I build applications, I do not focus only on code - I also focus on whether the system solves an actual problem and makes sense for users.

philosophy.title: How I approach projects
philosophy.body: I do not start with a framework. First I try to understand the problem, the user, and the process. Only then do I choose the technology, design data structures, API, and the application flow.

ai.title: AI workflow
ai.body: I use AI consciously - Claude, ChatGPT, Copilot, and Cursor are my work tools, not oracles. I verify every output, understand the code that comes from AI, and take full responsibility for what I deliver.

projects.title: Case studies, not just screenshots
projects.subtitle: Two core products solving real business problems and this portfolio website as a separate engineering project.

staymap.title: StayMap Polska
staymap.description: A production marketplace platform for accommodation in Poland. Map-first UX, Polish AI search, dynamic pricing, real-time chat, full host panel, and moderation.
staymap.stats: 12 modules · 44 views · 25 test files · 9 travel modes

prokom.title: PRO-KOM Service System
prokom.description: An electronics repair management system for service teams. Client, staff, and admin panels, Kanban board, async Celery jobs, status tracking, and process automation.
prokom.stats: 3 user panels · RBAC · Audit log · SSL/TLS

portfolio.title: Portfolio Website
portfolio.description: This website - a premium personal brand site built with Next.js 15, focused on performance, i18n, and UX.

hero.title: StayMap Polska
hero.subtitle: Map-first marketplace for domestic accommodation in Poland. Dynamic pricing, AI search, real-time chat.

problem.title: Problem
problem.body: Lack of a local map-first accommodation marketplace and pricing adapted to Polish seasonality.

role.title: My role
role.body: Backend-focused: API, geosearch, pricing engine, WebSocket chat, Celery tasks, infra.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.body: Next.js (BFF) → Daphne ASGI → Django REST + Channels → PostgreSQL+PostGIS + Redis + Celery

whatILearned.title: What I learned
whatILearned.body: Geospatial queries, ASGI architecture, complex pricing rules, production-grade integrations.

next.title: Roadmap
next.body: More E2E tests, monitoring, geosearch query optimization.

hero.title: PRO-KOM Service System
hero.subtitle: Repair management system: client, staff, admin panels, automation.

problem.title: Problem
problem.body: SME repair shops need process automation and real-time status tracking.

role.title: My role
role.body: System design, backend, Celery async jobs, reporting and integrations.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.body: Django REST → PostgreSQL → Redis → Celery → Next.js frontend, Docker, Nginx

whatILearned.title: What I learned
whatILearned.body: Translating business processes to data models, modular Django apps, scaling with Redis & Celery.

next.title: Roadmap
next.body: UX improvements, external accounting integrations, automated backups.

proofOfWork.title: Proof of Work - not logos, real implementation evidence
proofOfWork.subtitle: This section shows where each technology was used and why it mattered.

djangoDrf.title: Django + DRF
djangoDrf.description: StayMap REST API for bookings, auth, host flows, moderation, and AI search.

postgis.title: PostGIS + GeoDjango
postgis.description: Map-based accommodation geosearch with ranking tuned for real product behavior.

celeryRedis.title: Celery + Redis
celeryRedis.description: Redis in three roles and async jobs: cleanup, auto-cancel, reminders, cache refresh.

channelsWebsocket.title: WebSocket + Django Channels
channelsWebsocket.description: Realtime StayMap chat on ASGI + Daphne with message and typing events.

jwtGoogle.title: JWT + Google OAuth
jwtGoogle.description: Authentication and authorization with token-based sessions and secure flows.

dockerCompose.title: Docker Compose
dockerCompose.description: Development and production-like environments for both projects in containers.

nextAppRouter.title: Next.js App Router
nextAppRouter.description: Frontend/BFF architecture for StayMap and PRO-KOM with SSR/CSR composition.

testing.title: pytest + Playwright
testing.description: Backend and E2E coverage focused on critical user flows and reliability.

aiIntegration.title: AI Integration
aiIntegration.description: OpenAI API in StayMap and practical LLM usage with prompt engineering in workflow.

swagger.title: Swagger/OpenAPI
swagger.description: Auto-generated API documentation with drf-spectacular for faster integration.
